message:
feat(services): add RU service layer for fleet management

Implement comprehensive service layer for RU (Repo Updater) operations:

- ru-fleet.service.ts: Fleet management (CRUD, stats, filtering)
  - Add/remove/update repos in fleet
  - Query by status, group, owner
  - Track git state and sync status

- ru-sync.service.ts: Sync operations (clone/pull/fetch/push)
  - Parallel batch processing with configurable parallelism
  - Progress tracking and cancellation support
  - Real-time WebSocket updates

- ru-sweep.service.ts: Agent sweep orchestration (3-phase workflow)
  - Phase 1: Analysis - scan repos for issues
  - Phase 2: Planning - generate action plans
  - Phase 3: Execution - run approved plans
  - SLB approval integration
  - Risk assessment and action breakdown

Also adds:
- system:fleet WebSocket channel for real-time fleet events
- Fleet message types for all operations

Refs: flywheel_gateway-c7d

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -41,6 +41,23 @@ export type MessageType =
   | "checkpoint.imported"
   // Agent mail
   | "mail.received"
+  // Fleet (RU)
+  | "fleet.repo_added"
+  | "fleet.repo_removed"
+  | "fleet.repo_updated"
+  | "fleet.sync_started"
+  | "fleet.sync_progress"
+  | "fleet.sync_completed"
+  | "fleet.sync_cancelled"
+  | "fleet.sweep_created"
+  | "fleet.sweep_started"
+  | "fleet.sweep_progress"
+  | "fleet.sweep_completed"
+  | "fleet.sweep_failed"
+  | "fleet.sweep_cancelled"
+  | "fleet.plan_created"
+  | "fleet.plan_approved"
+  | "fleet.plan_rejected"
   // System
   | "health.ping"
   | "error";
